faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Lead Express

items.q: How does Lead Express match leads to my area?
items.a: Lead Express uses your zip code and service radius to automatically filter and deliver only leads within your work zone. No manual searching required.

items.q: Can I choose which types of jobs I receive?
items.a: Yes! You select your trade niche (HVAC, plumbing, electrical, etc.) and Lead Express filters leads specifically for your expertise.

items.q: How is this different from Facebook groups?
items.a: Unlike crowded groups where hundreds of technicians fight over the same lead, Lead Express delivers leads directly to you based on your location and trade. No noise, no competition.

items.q: How fast do I get notified about new leads?
items.a: Instantly. Our real-time notification system alerts you the moment a matching lead comes in, so you can be the first to respond.

items.q: Does Lead Express integrate with my existing tools?
items.a: Yes, Lead Express integrates with popular CRMs, scheduling tools, and communication platforms to fit seamlessly into your workflow.

items.q: What kind of support is available?
items.a: We offer email support for all plans, priority support for Growth and above, and dedicated account management for Enterprise customers.

cta.title: Grow your business fast
cta.desc: In today's competitive market, technicians need a smarter way to find and close leads. Stop scrolling through noisy groups — let the leads come to you.

footer.desc: Lead Express is designed to revolutionize how technicians find and close jobs.
